requirement_topic.en: EPDK Storage Activity and Turkish Grid-Connection Review
requirement_topic.zh: EPDK储能活动与土耳其并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: EPDK儲能活動與土耳其併網審查

summary.en: Turkey regulates electricity-market activities through EPDK, and storage projects may require project, licensing, market-participation, and grid-connection review depending on whether the BESS is standalone, paired with generation, behind-the-meter, or connected through a distribution or transmission interface. TEIAS or the relevant distribution operator may impose grid-code, protection, metering, power-quality, communication, dispatch, and acceptance-test requirements separate from product CE or TSE evidence.
summary.zh: 土耳其通过EPDK监管电力市场活动。储能项目是否需要项目、许可、市场参与及并网审查，取决于BESS是独立储能、与发电配套、用户侧，还是通过配电或输电接口接入。TEİAŞ或相关配电运营商可能提出电网规范、保护、计量、电能质量、通信、调度及验收测试要求，这些要求独立于产品CE或TSE证据。
summary.zht: 土耳其透過EPDK監管電力市場活動。儲能項目是否需要項目、許可、市場參與及併網審查，取決於BESS是獨立儲能、與發電配套、用戶側，還是透過配電或輸電接口接入。TEİAŞ或相關配電營運商可能提出電網規範、保護、計量、電能品質、通訊、調度及驗收測試要求，這些要求獨立於產品CE或TSE證據。

standards_or_laws: Turkish electricity-market legislation and EPDK secondary regulations for storage activities
Turkish Electricity Market Grid Regulation and grid-operator connection requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB/T 36558-2022 for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to power systems, together with grid-company technical specifications and project acceptance rules. This is useful engineering evidence, but it does not replace EPDK status analysis, Turkish grid-operator connection approval, or Turkish market-participation documentation.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB/T 36558-2022管理接入电力系统的电化学储能系统，并结合电网企业技术规范和项目验收规则。这些可作为工程证据，但不能替代EPDK身份判断、土耳其电网企业并网批准或土耳其市场参与文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB/T 36558-2022管理接入電力系統的電化學儲能系統，並結合電網企業技術規範和項目驗收規則。這些可作為工程證據，但不能替代EPDK身份判斷、土耳其電網企業併網批准或土耳其市場參與文件。

standards_or_laws: China grid-company interconnection and project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: A Turkey-bound BESS package should separate product compliance from project authorization. Exporters should provide grid studies, PCS settings, protection coordination, single-line diagrams, communication protocols, metering interfaces, site acceptance procedures, and Turkish-language operating documents for the Turkish project owner and grid operator.
gap.zh: 发往土耳其的BESS资料包应区分产品合规与项目授权。出口商应向土耳其项目业主和电网企业提供电网研究、PCS参数、保护配合、单线图、通信协议、计量接口、现场验收程序和土耳其语运行文件。
gap.zht: 發往土耳其的BESS資料包應區分產品合規與項目授權。出口商應向土耳其項目業主和電網企業提供電網研究、PCS參數、保護配合、單線圖、通訊協議、計量接口、現場驗收程序和土耳其語運行文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project requires EPDK status, licence, market participation, or grid-operator connection approval; exact route depends on project configuration and connection point
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558-2022 is recommended as a GB/T standard but may be required by grid-company project review or procurement

source.publisher: Energy Market Regulatory Authority of Turkey (EPDK / EMRA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE, TSE, and GB test reports do not grant EPDK status or grid connection. Treat Turkish storage permitting and grid acceptance as a separate workstream from product certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE、TSE和GB检测报告不会自动取得EPDK身份或并网批准。应将土耳其储能许可及电网验收作为独立于产品认证的工作流处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE、TSE和GB檢測報告不會自動取得EPDK身份或併網批准。應將土耳其儲能許可及電網驗收作為獨立於產品認證的工作流處理。
